title: Magnetic Stirrer, Mini Magnetic Stir Plate with 4 Pcs Stir Bars and 1Retriever, 3000RPM Magnetic Stirrer Mixer Lab Stirrers, Max Capacity 2000ml, 5 Gear Speed-Yellow(NO Heating)
description:
About this item
𝗠𝗶𝗻𝗶 𝗠𝗮𝗴𝗻𝗲𝘁𝗶𝗰 𝗦𝘁𝗶𝗿𝗿𝗲𝗿---This magnetic stirrer comes with cpmpact size and Light weight but strong support. Easy to carry along and store(No Heating).
𝗣𝗿𝗲𝗺𝗶𝘂𝗺 𝗠𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗿𝗶𝗮𝗹--- Our lab stirrer counter top is made of glass work panel, which is water-proof,durbale, easy to clean and maintain.
𝗣𝗼𝘄𝗲𝗿𝗳𝘂𝗹 𝗕𝗿𝘂𝘀𝗵𝗹𝗲𝘀𝘀 𝗗𝗖 𝗠𝗼𝘁𝗼𝗿--- Power supply: 11V; Output voltage: 5V;Max output current:1A.Max Stirring Speed: 3000 rpm; Max Stirring Capacity: 2000ml.
𝗔𝗱𝗷𝘂𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗯𝗹𝗲𝗦𝗽𝗲𝗲𝗱 𝗠𝗮𝗴𝗻𝗲𝘁𝗶𝗰 𝗠𝗶𝘅𝗲𝗿---Features with 5-gear speed adjusting design which can satisfy your various mixing needs and save your time.
𝗪𝗶𝗱𝗲 𝗔𝗽𝗽𝗹𝗶𝗰𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻---Perfect for stirring in scientific research, industry etc.
𝗛𝗼𝘄 𝘁𝗼 𝘂𝘀𝗲---Please put the stir bar to the beaker firstly, then turn on(off) the stirrer by long pressing the power button for 2 seconds, short press to regulate the speed like 1-2-3-4-5-4-3-2-1.For daily or low viscosity mixing needs,1-3 gear power is suggested, and this magnetic stirrer is NOT SUITABLE for large viscosity stirring.
𝗪𝗮𝗿𝗺 𝘁𝗶𝗽𝘀---Please use beaker or container with thin, non-magnetic, uniform and flat base for best performance.(Thick bottom may impact the stirring speed.) PLEASE READ THE USE MANUAL INSTRUCTION CAREFULLY TO GET A CORRECTLY USE METHOD BEFORE USING!
reviews_5s:
First off, I’m a biology teacher so I bought this for school use primarily. I have a different heavy duty one at work already, but I wanted one of my own to be able to use at home too.
I was blown away at the strength of the magnet. I saw little magnets and never thought it would mix 1 liter or more, and it took 1 liter with no problem at all!! It’s very lightweight, compact and portable which are all things I love about it!
It comes with a few little magnets, so I plan on designating some for work and some for home in case I need to use it form mixing something at home.
Totally a fun purchase for a teacher, aspiring science kid, or anyone who might want just a fun way to mix something up!Very basic design. One small stir bar included, only Chinese instructions included. Thought it wasn't working at first and then used Google Lens to translate and realized it was user error.

To use, you plug it in, and the stir bar will rotate for a few seconds at low speed and then shut off.
Hold in the power button ~5 seconds (longer than you'd like you need too) and it'll turn on to to the lowest spin speed. Short press the power button to then cycle through the 5 different spin speeds. Hold the button again to shut off.

At the fastest two speeds, the speed was too great and the stir bar flew off, but the first three settings will be more than enough for my needs.Play Video
I just got this haven’t truly tested it besides from what you see. I wish it was a little bit bigger buts it’s compact for small space which is what I needed. (side note: it’s light it’s plastic slightly feels cheap) I’ll be doing an updated post about this but as of now it worksIf you need to keep a liquid stirred to keep the components in suspension, this will do it well. Powered with a usb adapter, you can drop a magnet stir bar into the liquid and then set it on the base and stir away.
reviews_1s: Did not work on pint size jars at all . I think if the jars had a flat bottom it would of worked. But it wasn't what I needed so I returned it.I would avoid. Tried different USB power supplies and still does not workIt does not spin once you put liquid in the jar.Was missing my 4 stir barsIt does the job, but the overall quality leaves a lot to be desired. The build feels cheap and lightweight, which makes it unstable when stirring larger volumes close to its 2000ml capacity. Even at the highest gear, the stirring speed struggles with anything thicker than water, and the stir bars tend to lose their magnetic connection at higher speeds.
